c4Details.responsibility: Extract and validate hyperlinks from web pages
interactions: Connects to external URLs to fetch HTML content
Parses HTML documents to extract hyperlinks
Validates URLs against private IP address ranges

providers: Provides link extraction services to other components

infrastructure.scalingNeeds: Depends on number of concurrent URL processing requests

authorizationPatterns: IP address validation to prevent SSRF attacks

performance.dataVolume: Depends on size of HTML documents being processed

methods.name: getLinks
methods.description: Extracts all hyperlinks from a given URL

methods.name: getLinksV2
methods.description: Extracts hyperlinks after validating the URL is not pointing to a private IP address

flows.name: Basic Link Extraction
steps: Client calls LinkLister.getLinks(url)
Method creates empty ArrayList to store results
Jsoup connects to the provided URL and gets HTML document
Document is parsed to select all anchor elements
For each anchor element, extract absolute URL from href attribute
Add extracted URL to result list
Return list of URLs to caller
exceptions: IOException if URL connection or parsing fails

flows.name: Secure Link Extraction with IP Validation
steps: Client calls LinkLister.getLinksV2(url)
Method creates URL object from string parameter
Extract host from URL
Check if host starts with private IP ranges (172., 192.168, 10.)
If private IP detected, throw BadRequest exception
If URL is valid, call getLinks(url) to extract links
Return list of URLs to caller
exceptions: BadRequest if URL contains private IP or any other exception occurs

mainScenarios.name: Extract Links from Web Page
steps: Application calls LinkLister.getLinks with target URL
System connects to URL and retrieves HTML content
System parses HTML and extracts all hyperlinks
System returns list of absolute URLs to application
postconditions: Application receives complete list of hyperlinks from the page
alternativeFlows: If URL is invalid or unreachable, IOException is thrown

mainScenarios.name: Extract Links with Security Validation
steps: Consumer calls LinkLister.getLinksV2 with target URL
System validates URL is not pointing to private IP address
System connects to URL and retrieves HTML content
System parses HTML and extracts all hyperlinks
System returns list of absolute URLs to consumer
postconditions: Consumer receives list of hyperlinks from public web pages only
alternativeFlows: If URL points to private IP (172.*, 192.168.*, 10.*), BadRequest exception is thrown
If any other exception occurs during processing, it's wrapped in BadRequest exception
